_meta.notes: The threat. Larger furred carnivore that dens in the predator-den room and chases prey through the dripping cavern. Referenced by slime hardMove 'alert_predator' (introduce_npc) and beat 04-predator-stirs. The slime should NOT engage directly — vital math at v0.1 makes that lethal. Avoidance via mossy-alcove or escape via outside-fissure are the survival paths.

tagline: warm, slow, and patient. its musk has been in the rock since before you woke.

absorbProfile.rationale: the predator is too large to absorb without first being killed; v0.1 has no path to that

behavior.default: patient. tracks the dripping-cavern by listening to the floor.
behavior.ifNoticed: stalks toward the noise. arrives in 2-3 ticks.
behavior.ifEngaged: strikes once; the strike applies 4 cohesion damage in a single hit
behavior.ifFled: loses interest if the player reaches mossy-alcove or outside-fissure
narrativeHooks: Something heavy crosses the stone above. A slow, patient weight.
The musk thickens by an order of magnitude in the east passage.
It breathes through teeth. You taste the breath through the rock before the breath itself reaches you.

interactions.smother: blocked — predator has too much air to deplete
interactions.sense_tremor: returns a slow, deliberate weight crossing stone
interactions.ooze_toward: available; entering predator-den triggers an attack within 1 tick
interactions.mimic_shape_to_avoid: viable — the predator passes within 1 body-length without registering you as anything other than floor

fearTriggersHardMove: alert_predator (sound or chemistry of a partial-success carries)
